context.issue: payment_card_gbp_hpp was used with GBP, but Vauldex only supports payment_card_eur_hpp with EUR

errorDetails.description: Payment failed — user was redirected to /payment/error by Spoynt after unsuccessful card payment. Root cause: wrong Spoynt service (payment_card_gbp_hpp / GBP) was sent instead of payment_card_eur_hpp / EUR which is the only service configured for Vauldex.
possibleReasons: Wrong Spoynt service: payment_card_gbp_hpp sent instead of payment_card_eur_hpp
GBP currency not enabled for Vauldex merchant — only EUR is available
AUD, CAD, NZD are Averis-only currencies, not available on Vauldex

fix.description: Changed DEFAULT_PAYMENT_CURRENCY from GBP to EUR, SPOYNT_DEFAULT_SERVICE from payment_card_gbp_hpp to payment_card_eur_hpp, removed AUD/CAD/NZD (Averis-only), fixed hardcoded 'GBP' fallback in PricingCard purchaseIntent

messages.text: Тут був передан payment_card_gbp_hpp і gbp, а нужно payment_card_eur_hpp і eur — на vauldex пока так
на averis только aud cad nzd
